distinctive_elements: Hidden sound test accessible via cheat menu
Music sync issues in international versions due to removed torture scenes

notes.regional_differences: Japanese version includes torture scene animations with accompanying music; international versions skip these scenes, causing music to lose sync with on-screen action
notes.unused_content: Unused music track documented but not detailed
notes.data_limitations: No specific tempo, key, chord progression, or detailed SFX characteristic data available in provided sources
